mission: Build and maintain the Doxis platform with AI-assisted engineering: reduce regression risk, improve maintainability, and accelerate delivery through reusable agent-driven workflows.

agents.role: Orchestrates tasks, reviews plans, coordinates agents
Investigates and fixes bugs with regression notes
Multi-pass code review against quality and security standards
Validates release readiness, regression tests, release notes

projects.description: Reduce regression risk and improve editor maintainability in the Doxis SmartForms module
